title: Right to collective bargaining not impaired
doc_html:
§888.  Right to collective bargaining not impaired

Nothing in this Part shall be construed to deny or abridge the right of agricultural laborers by and through a labor organization or labor union to bargain collectively with their employer.

Acts 1956, No. 397, §8.
